description_long: This is a modern, boxy bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a mix of tan and brown wall surfaces, accented by green trim and large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light. The front facade includes a small patio area with green outdoor furniture and potted plants, while the side reveals a covered carport and additional greenery. Several mature trees and shrubs are positioned around the building, enhancing its integration with the landscape. The roof appears to have skylights and possibly solar panels, emphasizing a contemporary, eco-friendly design. The overall structure is compact, with a single story and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped patio, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio with green furniture, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the carport partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a garage door, and more greenery along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the patio, carport, and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
